recommendations.title: South Park the Streaming Wars Part 2
recommendations.overview: A drought has brought the town of South Park to the brink of disaster.

recommendations.title: South Park (Not Suitable for Children)
recommendations.overview: After it's discovered that a teacher at South Park Elementary has an OnlyFans page, Randy is compelled to take a closer look at the seedy underbelly of the world of online influencers.

recommendations.title: South Park the Streaming Wars
recommendations.overview: Cartman locks horns with his mom in a battle of wills while an epic conflict unfolds that threatens South Park’s very existence.

recommendations.title: South Park: The End of Obesity
recommendations.overview: The advent of new weight loss drugs has a huge impact on everyone in South Park. When Cartman is denied access to the life-changing medicine, the kids jump into action.

recommendations.title: South Park: Post COVID
recommendations.overview: What happened to the children who lived through the Pandemic? Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny survived but will never be the same Post Covid.

recommendations.title: South Park: Joining the Panderverse
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Cartman's deeply disturbing dreams portend the end of the life he knows and loves. Meanwhile, the adults in South Park are wrestling with their own life decisions, as the advent of AI is turning their world upside down.

recommendations.title: South Park: Post COVID: The Return of COVID
recommendations.overview: If Stan, Kyle and Cartman could just work together, they could go back in time to make sure Covid never happened. But traveling back to the past seems to be the easy answer until they meet Victor Chaos.

recommendations.title: South Park: Bigger, Longer & Uncut

recommendations.title: Orgazmo
recommendations.overview: A devout Mormon living in L.A. becomes a pornographic actor after his martial arts moves impress a big-time director.

recommendations.title: The Boy and the Beast
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Drama, Family, Fantasy
